case_title: EUROPEAN MOTORS LTD. et al VS GENKIN BORIS C/O EUROPEAN SKIN CARE STUDIO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $939.84 FILED BY EUROPEAN MOTORS LTD. 9 AS TO DEFENDANT GENKIN BORIS C/O EUROPEAN SKIN CARE STUDIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-26-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EUROPEAN MOTORS LTD. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GENKIN BORIS C/O EUROPEAN SKIN CARE STUDIO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
